challenges.pre_battle_dialogue: Kira looks you up and down slowly. 'The Glacier Badge isn't given. It's earned. Show me your resolve, or get off my ice.'
challenges.victory_dialogue: '...You surprised me. Take the Glacier Badge. You've earned the right to call yourself a trainer in Aurora Region.'
challenges.defeat_dialogue: 'Come back when you're ready. The ice doesn't forgive weakness — neither do I.'
challenges.notes: Kira's team: Sneasler (lv14), Froslass (lv14), Glacial Gyarados (lv17 signature). Battle engine should scale all three by level_scale_factor relative to party average.

challenges.reward: Stolen research documents (key item) + access to Glacial Lake Boreas deep zone
challenges.pre_battle_dialogue: Vale closes her notebook without looking up. 'You've made a significant mistake coming here. I'll demonstrate exactly why.' She stands slowly. 'Don't worry — this will be instructive.'
challenges.notes: Stage 1: Vale's patrol team (Alolan Sandslash lv20, Lapras lv21). Stage 2 (triggered at 50% defeat): Vale releases her personal Pokémon, Glaceon-Prime (lv25). Stage 2 is a full reset of participants.

challenges.reward: Glacial energy dispersed — regional forms stabilized; campaign climax
challenges.pre_battle_dialogue: The shrine's light intensifies. 'You've come this far. Then witness what I've built. Witness the future.' The leader steps forward from the light. 'This ends here — one way or another.'
challenges.notes: Final campaign boss. Three stages. Stage 3 includes a legendary encounter with the region's legendary Ice/Dragon Pokémon (to be defined). DM should narrate the shrine reacting to the battle.
